headline: Universal’s ‘The Odyssey’ Shatters Expectations in Quest to Top of the Global Box Office
summary: Initial estimates say Christopher Nolan’s latest epic sold $124.5 million at the domestic box office in its opening weekend.

raw.headline: Universal’s ‘The Odyssey’ Shatters Expectations in Quest to Top of the Global Box Office

headline: Price Prediction: Netflix Has 140% Upside Despite the Post-Earnings Dip
summary: Netflix just reported a revenue miss, a free cash flow collapse, and its stock sits near a 52-week low, yet our proprietary model is flashing one of the most aggressive buy signals we have issued all year.

raw.headline: Price Prediction: Netflix Has 140% Upside Despite the Post-Earnings Dip

headline: Universal and Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' sails to $124.5 million opening
summary: Christopher Nolan's "The Odyssey" tallied an estimated $124.5 million at the domestic box office, with IMAX screenings fueling a big haul.

raw.headline: Universal and Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' sails to $124.5 million opening
raw.summary: Christopher Nolan's "The Odyssey" tallied an estimated $124.5 million at the domestic box office, with IMAX screenings fueling a big haul.
